Jersey Boys (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $47,047,013Details
International Box Office $18,235,719
Worldwide Box Office $65,282,732
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,153,219
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,176,080
Total $12,329,299
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Jersey Boys tells the story of the four young men from the wrong side of the tracks in New Jersey who came together to form the `60s rock group The Four Seasons. Their trials and triumphs are accompanied by the hit songs that influenced a generation, and are now being embraced by a new generation of fans through the stage musical.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,319,371 (28.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.53 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:72.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,905 opening theaters/2,905 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $68,871,756

Synopsis

Jersey Boys tells the story of the four young men from the wrong side of the tracks in New Jersey who came together to form the `60s rock group The Four Seasons. Their trials and triumphs are accompanied by the hit songs that influenced a generation, and are now being embraced by a new generation of fans through the stage musical.
